videoSnippet.title: Short and Crushing || Vincent vs Alireza || Super Rapid & Blitz Croatia 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Keymer, Vincent (2627) - Firouzja, Alireza (2732) 
Grand Chess Tour: Super Rapid & Blitz Croatia 2026 (Chess.com) [04] 2026.07.02
A07 Reti, King's Indian attack (Barcza system)

1.Nf3 d5 2.g3 Nf6 3.Bg2 e6 4.O-O Be7 5.d3 b6 6.c4 Bb7 7.cxd5 Nxd5 8.Qa4+ Nd7 9.Ne5 Bf6 10.Nc6 Qc8 11.d4 a6 12.e4 b5 13.Qc2 Ne7 14.e5 Bxc6 15.Bxc6 Nxc6 16.exf6 Nxd4 17.fxg7 Rg8 18.Qxh7 Qb7 19.f3 O-O-O 20.Nd2 f5 21.Qh6 Ne5 22.Qe3 Qd5 23.Rb1 Rxg7 24.b4 f4 25.Qe4 fxg3 26.hxg3 Rxg3+

0:01 Hello Everyone!
00:43 Game Starts!
01:35 Completely New Game
03:00 Pause the Video!
05:16 IWITP 
07:00 Legends of the Channel
13:40 BIG LOTUS CHESS UPDATE!
